literal: a woman who is unspecified or anonymous

relabelled_senses.definition: To express or phrase something in a particular way; to choose specific words or wording for a statement or document.
Information transmitted orally from person to person rather than in writing.
Rumor or unofficial information circulating among the general public or a particular community.
A report or piece of information that has appeared on a newswire or been transmitted by a news agency.
To be unable to find words adequate to express emotion, admiration, shock, or another strong feeling.
Using very simple, basic language so that the listener can easily understand; explaining something in the clearest and most elementary terms.
A brief, practical piece of advice or warning intended for those who will recognize its value and act on it.
To use or employ an object or resource so intensively that it becomes worn out, damaged, or no longer useful.
To resolve, rework, or improve a musical piece by creating a remix version, often altering arrangement, production, or emphasis to achieve a different or improved effect.
To work extremely hard or continuously, often at difficult, unpleasant, or thankless tasks.
To perform or function perfectly, smoothly, or exactly as desired.
To labor very hard or tirelessly, often performing long hours or intense physical effort.
To work extremely hard for a prolonged period, often to the point of exhaustion or physical strain.
To employ one's particular skill, talent, or persuasive ability to produce a desired result, often with apparent ease.
To attack or beat someone severely; to assault and batter.
To cause or require someone to work extremely hard; to make someone put in a great deal of effort or labor.
To cause or require someone to work extremely hard; to make someone expend a great deal of effort or labor.
A colleague with whom one has a close, intimate, typically non-sexual relationship at work that resembles the emotional support and companionship of a spouse.
To move among or address members of an audience or gathering in order to engage, promote, solicit support, or sell something.
